authority: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)

controls.description: Organizational roles and responsibilities for cybersecurity must be established, communicated, and enforced.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical system or data asset has no designated security_owner, or if cybersecurity_responsibility_matrix has not been reviewed in the last 12 months.

controls.description: The organization's risk tolerance and appetite for cybersecurity risk must be determined and expressed.
controls.logic: FAIL if no risk_tolerance_statement exists approved by senior leadership, or if risk_appetite has not been reviewed in the last 12 months.

controls.description: Cybersecurity policies must be established, documented, approved, and communicated based on organizational requirements.
controls.logic: FAIL if cybersecurity_policy has no approval_date, or if policy_last_updated is older than 12 months, or if employee_acknowledgement_rate < 90%.

controls.description: Cyber supply chain risk management practices must be identified, established, managed, and monitored by organizational stakeholders.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical supplier has no cybersecurity_risk_assessment, or if supplier contracts lack security_requirements, or if last_supplier_review is older than 12 months.

controls.description: Physical and software assets within the organization must be inventoried and managed consistent with risk strategy.
controls.logic: FAIL if any asset record has classification = NULL, owner = NULL, or asset_last_updated older than 12 months.

controls.description: Data and information assets must be classified based on sensitivity and business criticality.
controls.logic: FAIL if any data_store or database has data_classification = NULL, or if data_flow_diagram_date is older than 24 months.

controls.description: Vulnerabilities in assets must be identified and documented as part of an ongoing risk assessment process.
controls.logic: FAIL if any system asset has last_vulnerability_scan older than 30 days, or if identified_vulnerabilities with cvss_score >= 7.0 have no remediation_plan.

controls.description: Identities and credentials for authorized users, services, and hardware must be managed.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user account has no expiry_date set, or if service_accounts have password_last_rotated older than 90 days, or if default_credentials_changed = FALSE.

controls.description: Remote access to assets must be managed securely with appropriate authentication controls.
controls.logic: FAIL if any remote_access record shows mfa_used = FALSE, or if vpn_session_logging = FALSE, or if remote_access_policy_review_date is older than 12 months.

controls.description: Access permissions must be limited to the minimum necessary for each user's role.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user has permissions beyond their role_definition, or if access_review has not been performed in the last 90 days for privileged users.

controls.description: Data at rest must be protected through encryption or other appropriate mechanisms.
controls.logic: FAIL if any sensitive data table or file store has encryption_at_rest = FALSE or data_protection_mechanism = 'NONE'.

controls.description: Data in transit must be protected through encryption.
controls.logic: FAIL if any network communication involving sensitive data uses http instead of https, or if tls_version < 1.2.

controls.description: System components including hardware, software, and services must be secured through baseline configurations.
controls.logic: FAIL if any system has hardening_baseline_applied = FALSE, or if default_password_changed = FALSE, or if unnecessary_services_disabled = FALSE.

controls.description: Patches and updates must be applied to all systems in a timely manner.
controls.logic: FAIL if any system has critical_patches_pending older than 30 days, or if patch_management_policy_exists = FALSE.

controls.description: All personnel must receive cybersecurity awareness training regularly.
controls.logic: FAIL if any active employee has security_training_completed = FALSE, or if training_completion_date is older than 12 months.

controls.description: Networks and network services must be monitored to detect potential cybersecurity events.
controls.logic: FAIL if network_monitoring_enabled = FALSE for any critical network segment, or if ids_ips_active = FALSE, or if last_alert_review is older than 24 hours.

controls.description: Log data from multiple sources must be collected, analyzed, and reviewed for anomalous activity.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical system has log_collection_enabled = FALSE, or if log_retention_days < 90, or if last_log_analysis_date is older than 7 days.

controls.requirement: Incident Response Plan Executed on Detection
controls.description: An incident response plan must be activated upon detection of a cybersecurity incident.
controls.logic: FAIL if any security_incident with severity IN ('HIGH','CRITICAL') has incident_response_plan_activated = FALSE, or if response_initiation_time > 4 hours after detection.

controls.description: Incidents must be reported to appropriate internal and external stakeholders consistent with response plans.
controls.logic: FAIL if any major incident has stakeholder_notification_sent = FALSE within 24 hours, or if regulatory_notification_required = TRUE but notification_sent = FALSE.

controls.description: Recovery processes must be executed and maintained to ensure organizational resilience.
controls.logic: FAIL if business_continuity_plan_tested = FALSE in the last 12 months, or if recovery_time_objective was missed during last incident, or if rto_met = FALSE.
